hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import re
path='/tmp/cc-agent/65774981/project/src/TrusteeDocumentPortal.tsx'
try:
    with open(path,'r') as f: lines=f.readlines()
    cleaned=[l for l in lines if l.strip().rstrip(';') != 'export default TrusteeDocumentPortal']
    while cleaned and cleaned[-1].strip()=='': cleaned.pop()
    has_fn=any('export default function TrusteeDocumentPortal' in l for l in cleaned)
    if not has_fn: cleaned.append('\nexport default TrusteeDocumentPortal;\n')
    n=sum(1 for l in cleaned if 'export default' in l)
    if n==1:
        with open(path,'w') as f: f.writelines(cleaned)
except: pass
" 2>/dev/null || true
